overall.description: A completely static shot from a fantasy video game showing a cozy, dimly lit wooden bedroom interior at night. The scene features medieval-style bunk beds, heavy curtains, and warm candle-like lighting with no camera movement or action occurring throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy wooden bedroom with bunk beds and leaded glass window

agents.ego_description: standing still in the bedroom, observing the cozy interior surroundings without movement

entered.detail: rustic wooden bunk bed with thick posts and upper sleeping loft
wooden ladder leaning against the bunk bed leading to the upper level
medieval-style leaded glass window with diamond pattern showing darkness outside
thick draped curtains in golden-yellow fabric hanging beside the window
wooden storage chest or dresser with rounded top on the left side

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cozy, dimly lit wooden bedroom interior from a fantasy game setting. The scene centers on a rustic bunk bed with ladder, flanked by a diamond-paned window with heavy curtains. Warm artificial lighting creates an intimate atmosphere, and the camera remains completely stationary throughout with no visible movement or action.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective of a cozy, dimly lit wooden bedroom within a fantasy setting. It begins with a centered view of a rustic bunk bed and its accompanying ladder, framed by a diamond-paned window draped in heavy curtains. As the scene lingers, the warm artificial lighting continues to cast an intimate glow across the wooden textures of the room. The camera remains entirely stationary, preserving the still and quiet atmosphere of the interior without any shift in position or action.
